Agenda

Site Updates

SESAME

No updates

HZB

Nothing to report

ESRF

No one attended, but in Marjolaine's apology email she mentioned adding the ICAT logo to the ESRF data portal

ISIS

Santhosh sent his apologies and this update

  • Nothing major and Business as usual
  • Updating IDS with the new domain (alias)
  • Investigating the reported OAI-PMH service slowness issue

ALBA

Updated to ICAT 6.2 - no issues.

Published helm chart we presented. Relevant links:

  • https://artifacthub.io/packages/helm/alba-helm-charts/icat-k8s/1.1.0
  • https://github.com/ALBA-Synchrotron/icat-k8s

DLS

Demoing DOI functionality to Diamond legal & some scientists.

Component Updates

icat.client

icat.client v6.2.0 released last week.

RK: as ICAT 7 approaches, would be good to have snapshots of icat.server 7 and also corresponding client to be able to test with

icat.server

Nothing since F2F, schema change broke search indexing code. Currently just removed invalid indexing code, but need to add indexing for new relationships.

PA: I can have a look and do the change RK: PR #294, however won't have time to work on it in the next few weeks

ids.server

D3A group found some bugs in ids.server, range header issues. Will need to do a bugfix release for this, but code hasn't been worked on yet

AOB

F2F website update

Louise created a PR to create a page for the website - feel free to review/correct any mistakes: https://github.com/icatproject/icatproject.github.io/pull/250

D3A

Working group is continuing to work, HTTP status code for "not available right now" - will eventually formulate community standard or even an RFC
